name: CyberSecPro
description: WhatsApp Bot Management SaaS — link numbers via pairing codes, manage sessions from a cyberpunk dashboard.

MONGO_URL.description: MongoDB connection string (recommended). Get a free cluster at mongodb.com/atlas. Example: mongodb+srv://user:pass@cluster.mongodb.net/cybersecpro. If left blank, the Heroku PostgreSQL addon (DATABASE_URL) is used instead.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string. Auto-injected by the Heroku PostgreSQL addon below — leave blank unless you are using an external PostgreSQL instance.

JWT_SECRET.description: Secret key for signing JWT auth tokens. Leave blank to auto-generate a secure random value.

ADMIN_EMAIL.description: Email address for the auto-created admin account. The account is created on first boot if it does not exist.

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for the auto-created admin account (min 6 characters). Required if ADMIN_EMAIL is set.

scripts.postdeploy: echo 'CyberSecPro deployed. Open the app URL to get started.'
